title: RapiDoc Web Component Configuration
description: Configuration attributes for the rapi-doc custom HTML element that renders OpenAPI specifications as interactive API documentation.

spec-url.description: URL of the OpenAPI specification to render.

update-route.description: When true, updates the browser URL hash as the user navigates through the API documentation.

route-prefix.description: Prefix to add to route paths in the URL hash.

sort-endpoints-by.description: Sort order for endpoints within each tag.

heading-text.description: Custom heading text to display in the header.

goto-path.description: Initial path to navigate to when the component loads.

fill-request-fields-with-example.description: Pre-fill request fields with example values from the spec.

persist-auth.description: Persist authentication data in localStorage across sessions.

theme.description: Color theme for the documentation UI.

bg-color.description: Background color for the documentation page.

header-color.description: Background color for the header bar.

primary-color.description: Primary accent color used for links, buttons, and highlights.

nav-bg-color.description: Background color for the navigation sidebar.

nav-text-color.description: Text color for the navigation sidebar.

nav-hover-bg-color.description: Hover background color for navigation items.

nav-hover-text-color.description: Hover text color for navigation items.

nav-accent-color.description: Accent color for active and highlighted navigation items.

nav-accent-text-color.description: Text color on accented navigation items.

use-path-in-nav-bar.description: Show endpoint paths instead of summaries in the navigation bar.

info-description-headings-in-navbar.description: Show headings from the info description as navigation items.

font-size.description: Base font size for the documentation.

regular-font.description: Font family for regular body text.

load-fonts.description: Whether to load default Google fonts.

render-style.description: Layout rendering style. 'read' shows request/response side by side, 'view' shows them stacked, 'focused' shows one endpoint at a time.

layout.description: Layout direction. 'row' places nav on the side, 'column' stacks everything vertically.

response-area-height.description: Height of the response area in the Try It console.

show-info.description: Show the API info section at the top.

allow-try.description: Show the Try It console for making live API requests.

allow-spec-url-load.description: Allow users to load a different spec URL from the UI.

allow-spec-file-load.description: Allow users to load a spec file from the local filesystem.

allow-spec-file-download.description: Show option to download the spec file.

allow-search.description: Show the search bar in the header.

allow-server-selection.description: Allow users to select a server from the servers list.

allow-schema-description-expand-toggle.description: Allow toggling expansion of schema descriptions.

schema-expand-level.description: Number of schema levels to expand by default.

schema-hide-read-only.description: When to hide read-only schema properties.

schema-hide-write-only.description: When to hide write-only schema properties.

default-schema-tab.description: Default tab to show for schema sections.

api-key-name.description: Name of the API key header or query parameter for authentication.

api-key-location.description: Location of the API key (header or query parameter).

api-key-value.description: Default value for the API key.

server-url.description: Default server URL to use for API requests.

default-api-server.description: URL of the default API server from the servers list.

fetch-credentials.description: Credentials policy for fetch requests made from the Try It console.

match-type.description: Search match type for filtering endpoints.
